search.placeholder: What place do you want to discover today?

footer.tagline: Making every step through the city count. The leading platform for local tourism gamification.

home.heroTitle: Discover the city, earn rewards and share your experience
home.heroSubtitle: Explore the most interesting corners of your city, complete unique challenges and redeem your points for rewards.
home.errorPois: There was an error loading the featured destinations.
home.challengesSubtitle: Complete unique challenges, discover new places and earn points to unlock exclusive rewards.
home.errorChallenges: There was an error loading the featured challenges.
home.step1Desc: Find the most interesting places in the city by filtering by your tastes.
home.step2Desc: Visit the place, interact with the community and earn points on your profile.
home.step3Desc: Redeem your points for discounts, VIP access and exclusive products.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of explorers and start earning today.

explore.title: Explore destinations
explore.emptyTitle: We couldn't find places matching your search.
explore.emptyHint: Try selecting another category or changing the keyword.
explore.error: There was an error loading the places. Please try again.

challenges.title: My Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Beat local challenges, earn points and unlock exclusive rewards while exploring the city.
challenges.emptyLogin: Log in to keep track of your challenges.
challenges.emptyAll: There are no challenges available right now. Come back soon!
challenges.emptyInProgress: You have no challenges in progress. Start one from the "All" tab.
challenges.emptyCompleted: You haven't completed any challenge yet. The first one is waiting!
challenges.error: We couldn't load the challenges. Please try again.
challenges.progressFeedback: Progress recorded! You still have goals left to complete the challenge.

rewards.title: Redeem your points
rewards.subtitle: Use your earned points to get discounts, VIP passes and exclusive merchandise from the best destinations.
rewards.loginPrompt: Log in to view and redeem rewards.
rewards.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Log in again to see the rewards.
rewards.empty: There are no rewards matching this filter right now.
rewards.error: There was an error loading the rewards. Please try again.
rewards.redeemMessage: This redemption deducts {{cost}} points from your balance ({{balance}} pts). Continue?
rewards.redeemedMessage: Show this code at {{name}} to claim your reward.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.subtitle: The places you've saved for later.
favorites.error: We couldn't load your favorites. Please try again.
favorites.emptyTitle: You haven't saved any place yet.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any destination to keep it handy here.
favorites.signedOutSubtitle: Save the places you want to visit and keep them always at hand.
favorites.signedOutTitle: Log in to see your saved places.

map.error: We couldn't load the places. Please try again.
map.geoDenied: You blocked access to your location. Enable it from the lock icon in the address bar to see what's nearby.
map.geoUnavailable: We couldn't determine your location. Showing downtown Barranquilla.
map.geoTimeout: Your location took too long to respond. Showing downtown Barranquilla.
map.geoDefault: We couldn't access your location. Showing downtown Barranquilla.
map.geoUnsupported: Your browser doesn't allow sharing your location.
map.geoInsecure: Location requires a secure connection (https or localhost). Showing downtown Barranquilla.
map.routeNeedLocation: We need your location to trace the route. Enable it and retry.
map.routeUnavailable: Route tracing is not available right now.
map.routeNoTarget: There is no place to route to with the current filter.
map.routeFailed: We couldn't trace the route right now. Please try again in a moment.

menu.anonSub: Log in to save places and earn points.
menu.logoutMessage: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
